_note: GENERATED by scripts/generate-class-resources.mjs from the *-features.json catalogs. Do not edit by hand; re-run the script instead.

resources.guidance: 1/short rest, take one additional action on your turn.
Rebuild a destroyed drone on a long rest for free, or in 1 minute once per day.
Reaction: +3 AC against one ranged attack you can see, 3/long rest.
1/long rest, split one single-target damaging program among up to three targets.
1/long rest, for 1 minute your drones act independently and you may cast one routine through each.
1/long rest, the DM tells you one useful secret about a person you converse with.
1/long rest, one drone turns invisible for 1 minute.
1/short rest, reroll a failed CHA-based check.
1/long rest, reroll a failed saving throw.
2/long rest, 10 minutes of tinkering restores a broken device or gives a tool user +1d4 for 1 hour.
1/long rest, declare a contact anywhere; one favor within reason simply succeeds.
1/long rest, an ally at 0 HP within 30 ft instantly regains 3d6 + WIS HP.
1/day, regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower on a short rest.
1/long rest, an ally within 30 ft that would drop to 0 HP drops to 1 instead.
1/long rest, ask the DM three questions about local people, places, or events; get brief true answers.
1/long rest, regain expended slot levels equal to your CHA modifier.
Reaction: impose disadvantage on an attack against an ally you can see, 2/rest.
1/short rest, touch cures any disease, poison, blindness, deafness, or paralysis.
1/long rest, fly 30 ft for 10 minutes.
1/long rest, your next damaging psionic deals maximum damage.
1/long rest, control a construct or networked system for 1 minute (INT save negates).
Each drone regains 2d6 HP at the start of your turn, once per rest each.
1/rest, listen in on any electronic or magical communication within 100 ft.
1/long rest, cast a psionic of 5th level or lower without a slot at two targets.
1/short rest, bonus action: +2 AC until the start of your next turn.
Bonus action touch: an ally regains 1d6 + WIS HP. Uses per long rest equal WIS modifier.
1/long rest, for 1 minute make one additional blade attack on each of your turns.
1/long rest, call in a favor: gear, a ride, a name, or entry somewhere (DM adjudicates scope).
2/rest, cast a cantrip as a bonus action after casting a leveled psionic.
1/long rest, a creature hit by your psionic saves (WIS) or is stunned until your next turn.
Regain 4 expended slot levels on a short rest, once per day.
1/long rest while below half HP, bonus action to regain 10 + level HP.
1/long rest, drop yourself to 1 HP: deal the HP paid as radiant damage divided among any creatures within 30 ft (DEX save halves).
1/rest, pay 5 HP: one attack this turn becomes an automatic hit if the roll would miss by 3 or less.
1/rest, emit bright warding light 20 ft for 10 minutes; hostile undead and fiends in it have disadvantage on attacks against your allies.
The guild's birds watch every district; ask the DM once per day where a named person was seen.
1/long rest, for 1 minute you cannot drop below 1 HP.
1/long rest, when you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead and gain temp HP equal to your level.
1/rest, repeat the last dirge you cast this turn at a new target for free (3rd level or lower).
1/long rest, for 1 minute all your attacks against fiends, undead, and cursed creatures deal maximum weapon dice.
1/rest, when a fiend or undead hits you, it takes 3d8 radiant (CON save halves).
1/long rest, a 20-ft radius garden of black roses for 1 minute: allies in it regain 1d6 HP per turn, enemies are slowed.
1/rest, spectral hands erupt in a 15-ft cube: creatures save (STR) or are restrained until your next turn.
1/long rest, wreathe yourself in gray flame for 1 minute: +2d8 fire on your attacks and immunity to fire.
1/rest, a ranged attack against your brand becomes an automatic critical if it hits.
1/long rest, summon a giant rat pack: four allied giant-rat-statted beasts serve for 10 minutes.
1/rest, a melee hit also deals 2d8 necrotic and the target cannot regain HP until your next turn.
1/long rest, when you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead.
1/long rest, choose life or death for a touched creature: full HP restored, or 10d10 necrotic (CON save halves).
1/long rest, a wheeling flock blinds enemies in a 20-ft radius for 1 minute (CON save each turn).
1/long rest, take an extra full turn immediately after killing your branded quarry.
1/long rest, touch removes all poison, disease, curse of 5th level or lower, blindness, deafness, and paralysis from one creature.
1/rest, teleport 30 ft in a swirl of dead petals as a bonus action.
1/rest, your Hunter's Brand target takes 2d10 radiant when you hit it (declared before the roll).
1/long rest, a 20-ft radius circle for 10 minutes: enemies treat it as difficult terrain and take 2d6 poison entering (CON save halves).
1/rest, a swarm floods a 15-ft cube: difficult terrain, and creatures inside save (DEX) or take 2d6 piercing and are distracted (disadvantage on their next attack).
Bonus action: an ally within 60 ft gains a d6 to add to one attack, check, or save; CHA-mod uses per long rest.
1/long rest, a killing note: one creature below 50 HP that can hear you saves (CON) or drops to 0.
1/long rest, raise one slain foe as a loyal skeletal squire for 8 hours (uses its stats, obeys you).
Your Swarm Sense covers the whole district; ask the DM once per short rest what the rats have seen.
1/long rest, for 1 minute every enemy within 30 ft is swarmed: half speed, no reactions, and 1d6 piercing at the start of each of its turns.
1/long rest, mass brand: every enemy within 30 ft is branded at once (WIS save negates each).
1/long rest, when you drop to 0 HP, the flock carries you 60 ft to safety and you stabilize.
1/long rest, spectral voices join you for 1 minute: your dirges affect one additional target.
1/long rest, when an ally within 30 ft dies, they instead drop to 1 HP and your next attack is an automatic critical if it hits.
1/long rest, sing a fallen ally within a minute of death back to 1 HP without material components.
1/long rest, regain expended slot levels equal to your CHA modifier.
1/rest, all enemies within 30 ft that can hear you save (WIS) or deal half damage on their next attack.
1/rest, drop through a grate, crack, or shadow as a reaction when targeted; the attack misses and you move 15 ft.
1/rest, a scream: creatures in a 15-ft cone save (CON) or take 3d6 fire and are deafened for 1 minute.
Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action, CON-mod uses per short rest.
Learn one 6th-level warlock spell; cast it 1/long rest without a slot.
1/long rest, cast any warlock spell of 5th level or lower without a slot, twinned to two targets.
1/long rest, you and up to three allies see and strike into the Ethereal Plane for 1 minute.
1/long rest, a spirit or fiend that fails against your Rite of Repulsion is also restrained for 1 minute.
1/long rest, gain temp HP equal to twice your level when combat starts.
1/rest, cast a 1st-level stigmata without a slot; take 1d4 necrotic that cannot be reduced.
1/rest, reaction when hit: gain resistance to that damage type until your next turn.
1/rest, see through the eyes of a creature you can see for 1 minute (WIS save negates).
1/short rest, declare a called shot: on hit, the target also loses one movement mode, attack, or sense until your next turn.
1/long rest, compel a spirit within 30 ft to manifest visibly and audibly for 10 minutes.
1/long rest, when an ally within 30 ft drops to 0 HP, they instead drop to WIS-mod x 5 HP.
1/long rest, a 10-minute setup makes a 20-ft radius immune to teleportation and phasing for 1 hour.
Allies within 10 ft may use your Adrenaline Surge movement options as a reaction when you do, 1/rest each.
1/long rest, force an invisible, ethereal, or shapechanged creature within 60 ft into its true visible form for 1 minute (CHA save negates).
1/long rest, for 1 minute your attacks ignore resistance and immunity to nonmagical damage.
1/short rest, halve the damage of one hit against you.
1/rest, when an ally fails an INT, WIS, or CHA save within 30 ft, let them reroll with your guidance.
1/rest, after a creature you have measured attacks, impose disadvantage on that attack.
1/long rest, your next apparatus spell is cast at maximum effect and cannot be resisted by legendary resistance.
1/rest, an ally within 30 ft ends one charm, fear, or madness effect on itself.
Action: fiends, undead, and spirits within 30 ft save (WIS) or must move away from you for 1 minute. WIS-mod uses per long rest.
1/long rest, a 1-minute ritual expels a possessing entity from a host (contested WIS, you have advantage).
1/long rest, duplicate a stigmata of 2nd level or lower you just cast at a second target for free.
1/long rest, a 10-minute session lets the party ask a lingering spirit three questions; it answers truthfully but briefly.
1/rest, find one mundane useful item nearby (a weapon, keys, bandages); the DM decides what plausibly exists.
Learn one 7th-level warlock spell; cast it 1/long rest without a slot.
1/long rest, close a portal, summoning, or breach of CR/level 5 or lower as an action.
1/long rest, take two full turns in the first round of combat.
1/long rest, when you expend your last spell slot, immediately regain it.
1/long rest, reroll any one die you or a creature within 60 ft just rolled; the reroll stands.
1/long rest, when you would drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead and your Vigil reignites at double radius.
Won't Die Here works 2/day, and each use also restores CON-mod x 5 HP.
1/long rest, for 1 minute your stigmata cost no verbal or somatic components and cannot be counterspelled.
2/rest, cast a cantrip as a bonus action after casting a leveled stigmata.
1/long rest, an attack against a creature at half HP or lower becomes an automatic critical if it hits.
1/long rest, banish a fiend, undead, or spirit of CR 15 or lower to its home plane (CHA save negates).
1/long rest, cast one stigmata of 5th level or lower without a slot at its maximum effect.
1/long rest, regain expended slot levels equal to your CHA modifier when you drop below half HP.
1/long rest, step through the Veil: teleport 60 ft to a space you can see.
1/day, when you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead.
1/long rest, when a creature within 30 ft dies, hold its spirit: it can be revived within 24 hours as if freshly dead.
1/long rest, your treatments treat one target's saving throw as if it rolled a 1.
1/long rest, let a spirit speak through you: it converses with the party for 10 minutes.
1/rest, end one charm, fear, or illusion effect on a creature within 30 ft.
1/long rest, the DM tells you how two clues you hold relate, or that they do not.
1/long rest, when things go wrong, narrate a prepared escape (a bribed guard, a loose window); the DM makes it viable.
Reaction when attacked: your read of the attacker imposes disadvantage, INT-mod uses per long rest.
1/rest, impose disadvantage on a creature's attack or check by voicing its doubt aloud (WIS save negates).
Reaction: impose disadvantage on one attack against you, CHA-mod uses per long rest.
Reaction when hit: gain resistance to that instance of damage, WIS-mod uses per long rest.
1/long rest, name the culprit mechanism or motive; the DM confirms which parts of your theory are right.
1/long rest, a creature that can hear you treats you as a trusted friend for 10 minutes (WIS save negates).
1/long rest, lay a spirit to rest or release a possession without a contest; hostile entities get a CHA save.
1/long rest, publish or threaten to: a named organization must respond publicly within a day, opening a door for the party.
1/long rest, you and all allies within 30 ft each gain a reaction attack when any one of you is hit, for 1 minute.
A bound protective spirit follows you: 1/rest, it negates one attack that would hit you.
1/long rest, when you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead.
1/rest, ask the DM who in the current scene knows something about your story; you get a true pointer.
1/long rest, reveal a con at the perfect moment: every enemy who believed it is stunned until their next turn (WIS save negates).
1/long rest, a willing or restrained creature answers three questions truthfully under trance (WIS save resists if unwilling).
1/short rest, after examining a scene, person, or object, ask the DM one pointed question; the answer is a true, useful clue.
1/rest, force every hostile creature within 30 ft to save (WIS) or be frightened of you for 1 minute.
1/long rest, reconstruct a past scene you visited in perfect detail; the DM answers three questions about it.
1/rest, an interrogation question must be answered truthfully or the subject visibly refuses (WIS save to refuse quietly).
1/long rest, an illusory double of a creature's guilt confronts it: it is frightened of you for 1 minute (WIS save negates).
1/long rest, call a procession of spirits: for 1 minute they obscure, terrify (WIS save), and strike (2d8 necrotic) as you direct.
1/long rest, cure a creature of a long-term madness, phobia, or compulsion, including magical ones.
1/rest, allies within 30 ft gain temp HP equal to your level + CON mod.
Double proficiency bonus on Insight; 1/rest, learn whether a creature is lying, afraid, or concealing something.
1/rest, glimpse a place, person, or event connected to a held object: one true image.
1/long rest, link the party's minds for 10 minutes: silent communication and shared Insight results.
1/short rest, reroll a failed Deception or Persuasion check.
1/rest, commune with a spirit tied to a place, object, or body; it answers three brief questions truthfully as it understood things.
Bonus action: a shielding spirit grants you or an ally +2 AC until your next turn, WIS-mod uses per long rest.
Your Front Page Pressure reaches every city on the wire; 2 uses per long rest.
1/long rest, call in the full network: three true answers about any ongoing scheme, no matter how hidden.
1/long rest, cast one treatment of 5th level or lower without a slot; it cannot be resisted by creatures you have a Trauma Map of.
1/rest, grant yourself and allies within 30 ft advantage on the next check made in pursuit of a suspect.
1/long rest, declare a con you have been running this session; the DM retroactively honors the setup within reason.
Keen Deduction has 3 uses per short rest.
1/long rest, publish the truth: a named creature's public standing collapses, and its allies must save (WIS) or abandon it.
1/long rest, read a sleeping or unconscious creature's dreams for three true impressions.
1/long rest, project your spirit up to 1 mile for 10 minutes; your body is helpless but warded.
1/long rest, compel a spirit witness to relive its last hour aloud; the DM narrates what it saw.
Hide as a bonus action even in plain sight, 3/long rest.
1/long rest, a crowd within earshot acts on your words: blocks a street, boos a villain, shelters a fugitive.
1/rest, hostile beasts and mutants within 30 ft save (WIS) or cower (no move toward you) for 1 minute.
1/long rest, summon 1d4 local beasts to aid you for 10 minutes.
Advantage on Stealth; 1/rest, turn near-invisible until you attack or cast.
1/rest, trigger or predict a structural collapse: creatures in a 15-ft cube save (DEX) or take 4d6 bludgeoning and are restrained by rubble.
1/rest, your raised hand sheds sunlight in a 30-ft radius for 10 minutes; undead and mutants in it have disadvantage on attacks.
1/long rest, produce exactly the mundane item the party needs; you scavenged it earlier.
1/rest, end one fear, charm, or curse effect on a creature within 30 ft.
1/rest, constructs and machines within 15 ft save (CON) or are stunned until your next turn.
Bonus action: one ally within 30 ft gains temp HP equal to your level + WIS mod, WIS-mod uses per long rest.
1/rest, emit a 10-ft flare: enemies save (CON) or are blinded until your next turn.
1/rest, reduce all damage you take this round by your CON modifier.
1/long rest, regain expended slot levels equal to your CHA modifier when you drop below half HP.
Scrap Sense always finds two items; 1/day one of them is exactly what you ask for.
1/long rest, for 1 minute your speed doubles, Ram Speed deals +4d6, and you resist all damage.
1/long rest, your beast grows monstrous for 1 minute: double HP, +10 ft speed, attacks deal +2d8 and frighten (WIS save).
1/rest, repair or rig a device, vehicle, or weapon in 1 minute; it works for a scene.
When your beast would drop to 0 HP, 1/long rest it drops to 1 instead; the same holds for you while it lives.
2/rest, whack a machine or construct: restore 1d8 + INT HP to it or clear one malfunction.
1/rest, cast a 1st-level tech effect without expending a slot.
1/long rest, receive a true omen about a planned course of action (weal, woe, or both).
Choose one 5th-level tech effect; cast it 1/long rest without a slot.
1/long rest, after taking elemental damage, gain resistance to that type until you rest.
1/long rest, for 1 minute your tech effects of 4th level or lower cost no slots; you glow visibly.
Spend a hit die as a bonus action to heal, CHA-mod uses per long rest.
1/long rest, deliver the full sermon: allies within 60 ft regain 5d8 HP and are freed of fear, charm, and exhaustion by one level.
1/rest, when an ally within 30 ft drops to 0 HP, immediately move your speed and make one attack.
1/long rest, project a 10-ft energy dome for 1 minute: allies inside gain +2 AC and resistance to ranged weapon damage.
1/short rest, search any ruin or wreck for 10 minutes and find one genuinely useful item (the DM decides what plausibly exists).
1/long rest, unleash the core: a 30-ft radius burst dealing 8d6 radiant (CON save halves); allies are spared.
1/rest, you and your beast each gain +2 to damage rolls for 1 minute.
1/long rest, reaction when hit: split into a swarm shape until your next turn, taking half damage from the attack and moving through gaps freely.
1/long rest, when an ally within 30 ft drops to 0 HP, they instead drop to WIS-mod x 5 HP.
2/rest, cast a cantrip as a bonus action after casting a leveled mutation.
1/rest, an audible sermon gives allies within 30 ft advantage on their next save against fear or despair.
1/long rest, your search turns up something rare: old-world tech, ammo cache, or medicine (DM picks the form).
1/long rest, for 1 minute your mutations of 3rd level or lower cost no slots and your Adaptive Hide grants +2 more AC.
1/long rest, ask the DM one question answerable from pre-Fall records; you recall the answer.
Call the Wild summons 2d4 beasts and recharges on a short rest 1/day.
1/day, find or purify enough water and food for six people.
1/long rest, when you drop to 0 HP, keep fighting: you remain conscious at 0 for 1 minute, then fall.
1/long rest, regain expended slot levels equal to your INT modifier.
1/long rest, regain expended slot levels equal to your CHA modifier.
1/rest, your tuned weapon deals +2d8 lightning on one hit; the target cannot take reactions until its next turn.
When an effect would destroy or disable a held gadget, it survives; 1/long rest, ignore being disarmed.
1/rest, when combat starts, immediately move your speed and make one attack.
1/rest, fire at up to three targets in a 15-ft cone with a single attack roll each.
1/long rest, absorb a lightning or aether effect targeting you: negate it and regain a 1st-level slot.
A prepared stone: 1/rest, add +1d4 to one formula's damage or healing.
1/rest, a single-target lightning art jumps to a second target within 15 ft for half damage.
1/rest, take the calculated answer: treat one INT-based check as a natural 20.
1/long rest, a 20-ft radius acid fog for 1 minute: 3d6 acid at the start of each creature's turn inside (CON save halves).
1/long rest, brew a greater elixir: drinker gains advantage on everything for 1 minute.
1/rest, when reduced below half HP, vent: attackers within 10 ft take 3d8 fire (DEX save halves).
2/rest, 1 minute of work restores 1d8 + INT HP to a construct, machine, or armored ally.
1/long rest, double your speed and gain an extra action each turn for 1 minute; take 3d10 fire when it ends.
1/rest, a stinking cloud fills a 10-ft radius for 1 minute: creatures inside save (CON) or retch, losing their action.
1/rest, a creature that touches or melee-hits you takes 1d8 lightning.
1/rest, loose a box of whirring gears: a 15-ft cube becomes difficult terrain and deals 2d6 slashing to creatures entering it, for 1 minute.
1/long rest, for 1 minute your arts of 3rd level or lower cost no slots.
1/long rest, cast one schematic of 6th level or lower without a slot; constructs and machines cannot resist it.
Choose one 3rd-level schematic; cast it 1/long rest without a slot.
1/long rest, declare you prepared exactly the right device for this situation; the DM makes it work once.
1/long rest, a damaging art rolls maximum dice; you take 1d10 lightning backlash.
1/rest, a gadget or machine you hold works at double effect for 1 minute.
1/rest, cast a 1st-level schematic without expending a slot.
Your touch runs any machine without fuel for 1 hour, CHA-mod uses per long rest.
1/rest, a touched machine, trap, or construct malfunctions at the worst moment for its owner (DM adjudicates).
1/rest, adjacent creatures save (CON) or are blinded by scalding mist until your next turn.
1/rest, adjacent creatures save (DEX) or take 3d8 fire and are pushed 10 ft when you vent your armor.
1/rest, turn to crackling energy and move 30 ft through creatures and objects as a bonus action.
1/long rest, cast a formula of 3rd level or lower without expending a slot.
2/rest, cast a cantrip as a bonus action after casting a leveled art.
1/long rest, a whirling storm shield for 1 minute: +2 AC and melee attackers take 2d8 lightning.
1/long rest, for 1 minute your Daring Maneuver applies to every attack and enemies who see you save (WIS) or are frightened.
1/long rest, cast one formula of 7th level or lower without a slot; its dice are maximized.
1/long rest, your familiars merge into a brass juggernaut for 10 minutes (double HP, 2d10 + INT slam, you may ride it).
1/long rest, for 1 minute you and adjacent allies have resistance to all damage.
Reaction when hit in melee: the attacker takes 2d6 acid as an ampoule bursts, INT-mod uses per long rest.
